data.name: SurfaceBufferLengthMismatch
data.value: BGRA publication length must equal {0} bytes; actual: {1}.

data.name: SurfaceGenerationNotIncreasing
data.value: Publication generation must increase monotonically; previous: {0}; actual: {1}.

data.name: SurfaceHeightOutOfRange
data.value: Raster surface height must be between 1 and {0} inclusive; actual: {1}.

data.name: SurfaceOwnerMustBeSta
data.value: Raster surface must be created on an STA UI thread.

data.name: SurfaceWidthOutOfRange
data.value: Raster surface width must be between 1 and {0} inclusive; actual: {1}.

data.name: SurfaceWrongThread
data.value: Raster surface publication must run on its owner UI thread.
